rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/16/19. Petition still has not been amended to set forth the amount of fees to the trustee and attorneys. If the amendment and supporting fee declarations are not filed in time to give 30 days' notice before the 4/16/19 hearing, an appearance will be required on that day. (Accounting has not been fully reviewed. A 2014 Ford Explorer was sold but was not on hand at the beginning of the accounting period.) Closing statements must be filed to verify the costs of any real property sale. The declaration regarding retention of original statements must also be corrected to include all of the language required by LRSF 2.11 M.4.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RICHARD E. SIMMONS 2013 REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Helen D'Vorah Simmons Petition Of Orders: 1) Compelling Production Of Documents And Information ...Et Al
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Page 3 of the 2013 Trust, which was attached to petition filed on 2/10/17, is missing. Additional notice may be required. 2) Settlement Agreement attached to petition filed on 12/21/18 was not signed by attorney James Braden (as to form). 3) Direct notice was not given to Marilyn Saner, but was given c/o to her attorney. 4) Petitioner requests termination of trust per Probate Code 15403(a), as all beneficiaries of the trust consent, and because the continuance of the trust is not necessary to carry out a material purpose of the trust. Petitioner alleges that the material purpose of the trust is for Maralisa Simmon-Cook to receive the trust assets. 5) Proposed order has not been submitted.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEON J. WILLIAMS REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 10/5/99 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Respondent Daniels Demurrer To Petition
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer to the First Cause of Action is sustained with leave to amend. Demurrer to the Second Cause of Action on standing grounds is overruled. Demurrer to Second Cause of Action for failure to state a cause of action is sustained with leave to amend in compliance with Probate Code § 17201. Demurrer to the Third Cause of Action on failure to state facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action grounds is overruled. Demurrer to Third Cause of Action for failure to state a cause of action is sustained with leave to amend in compliance with Probate Code § 17201. Demurrer to the Fourth Cause of Action on standing grounds is sustained with leave to amend, to file a declaration/affidavit that meets the requirements of CCP § 377.32. Demurrer to the Fourth Cause of Action on the grounds of uncertainty is overruled. The Demurrer to the Fifth Cause of Action on standing grounds is sustained, with leave to amend. Demurrer to the Sixth Cause of Action on standing grounds is sustained, with leave to amend. Demurrer to the Sixth Cause of Action on statute of limitation grounds is sustained, with leave to amend. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, March 12, 2019.
